creator: mlen@mlen.pl
text:
Hello!

This port is still failing to build for me on 10.1-RELEASE-p5.
I was able to work around -j issue by setting MAKE=gmake and avx instruction issue (no such instruction error messages) by setting CC=gcc48.

Currently I'm facing this issue and I wasn't able to find a solution:

make[5]: Entering directory '/usr/ports/math/sage/work/sage-6.4.1/local/var/tmp/sage/build/ppl-1.1/src'
 cd . && /bin/sh /usr/ports/math/sage/work/sage-6.4.1/local/var/tmp/sage/build/ppl-1.1/src/missing automake-1.14 --foreign
/usr/ports/math/sage/work/sage-6.4.1/local/var/tmp/sage/build/ppl-1.1/src/missing: automake-1.14: not found
WARNING: 'automake-1.14' is missing on your system.
         You should only need it if you modified 'Makefile.am' or
         'configure.ac' or m4 files included by 'configure.ac'.
         The 'automake' program is part of the GNU Automake package:
         <http://www.gnu.org/software/automake>
         It also requires GNU Autoconf, GNU m4 and Perl in order to run:
         <http://www.gnu.org/software/autoconf>
         <http://www.gnu.org/software/m4/>
         <http://www.perl.org/>
Makefile:486: recipe for target 'Makefile.in' failed
make[5]: *** [Makefile.in] Error 1
make[5]: Leaving directory '/usr/ports/math/sage/work/sage-6.4.1/local/var/tmp/sage/build/ppl-1.1/src'
Error building the Parma Polyhedra Library.

Automake is obviously installed on my system (maybe it complains about a wrong version).
# pkg info |grep automake
automake-1.15                  GNU Standards-compliant Makefile generator

There's sage 4.5 available, so maybe updating the port to use this version will make things better.
